default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Walkthrough of Rimkus' CMS and publishing process for GrowthX team to understand and prepare for content creation and publishing.](https://fathom.video/share/BZMMXCsUwAkgmmySMN24pstEuxFCS3gd?tab=summary&timestamp=200.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX will draft content in WordPress, with Rimkus team initially reviewing and publishing](https://fathom.video/share/BZMMXCsUwAkgmmySMN24pstEuxFCS3gd?tab=summary&timestamp=256.0)
  - [Gradual ramp-up: 1 calibration blog, then 3, then 5 per week](https://fathom.video/share/BZMMXCsUwAkgmmySMN24pstEuxFCS3gd?tab=summary&timestamp=379.0)
  - [Rimkus to handle image selection; potential for GrowthX to assist later](https://fathom.video/share/BZMMXCsUwAkgmmySMN24pstEuxFCS3gd?tab=summary&timestamp=1049.0)
  - [GrowthX will provide full SEO metadata (title, description, URL slug)](https://fathom.video/share/BZMMXCsUwAkgmmySMN24pstEuxFCS3gd?tab=summary&timestamp=1297.0)
  - [GrowthX to track performance of both their content and Rimkus' organic content](https://fathom.video/share/BZMMXCsUwAkgmmySMN24pstEuxFCS3gd?tab=summary&timestamp=1735.0)

## Topics

### CMS Access and Publishing Process

  - GrowthX team granted WordPress access via <team@growthxlabs.com>
  - [Content types: articles (rimkus.com/article/title) and blog posts (rimkus.com/blog/title)](https://fathom.video/share/BZMMXCsUwAkgmmySMN24pstEuxFCS3gd?tab=summary&timestamp=865.0)
  - [WordPress blocks used for formatting; no strict templates, but guidelines exist](https://fathom.video/share/BZMMXCsUwAkgmmySMN24pstEuxFCS3gd?tab=summary&timestamp=928.0)
  - [GrowthX to draft content, Rimkus to review and publish initially](https://fathom.video/share/BZMMXCsUwAkgmmySMN24pstEuxFCS3gd?tab=summary&timestamp=256.0)
  - [Potential for GrowthX to publish directly after trust is established](https://fathom.video/share/BZMMXCsUwAkgmmySMN24pstEuxFCS3gd?tab=summary&timestamp=290.0)

### Content Creation and Formatting

  - [GrowthX to handle article writing, SEO metadata, and formatting](https://fathom.video/share/BZMMXCsUwAkgmmySMN24pstEuxFCS3gd?tab=summary&timestamp=1297.0)
  - [Rimkus to manage image selection initially (using Shutterstock)](https://fathom.video/share/BZMMXCsUwAkgmmySMN24pstEuxFCS3gd?tab=summary&timestamp=1049.0)
  - [Potential for GrowthX to assist with image generation in later stages](https://fathom.video/share/BZMMXCsUwAkgmmySMN24pstEuxFCS3gd?tab=summary&timestamp=1049.0)
  - [Consideration needed for specific image requirements (e.g., Life Sciences content)](https://fathom.video/share/BZMMXCsUwAkgmmySMN24pstEuxFCS3gd?tab=summary&timestamp=1162.0)

### Performance Tracking and Reporting

  - [GrowthX to track performance of both their content and Rimkus' organic content](https://fathom.video/share/BZMMXCsUwAkgmmySMN24pstEuxFCS3gd?tab=summary&timestamp=1735.0)
  - [Reporting capabilities to show lift by individual pieces and topic clusters](https://fathom.video/share/BZMMXCsUwAkgmmySMN24pstEuxFCS3gd?tab=summary&timestamp=1803.0)
  - [GrowthX to provide a Looker dashboard for analytics in coming weeks](https://fathom.video/share/BZMMXCsUwAkgmmySMN24pstEuxFCS3gd?tab=summary&timestamp=1622.0)
  - [Ability to distinguish between GrowthX-produced and Rimkus organic content](https://fathom.video/share/BZMMXCsUwAkgmmySMN24pstEuxFCS3gd?tab=summary&timestamp=1735.0)

### Review Process and Workflow

  - [Rimkus transitioning from heavy review process to more streamlined approach](https://fathom.video/share/BZMMXCsUwAkgmmySMN24pstEuxFCS3gd?tab=summary&timestamp=1484.0)
  - [Jennifer and Alishia to refine internal review process](https://fathom.video/share/BZMMXCsUwAkgmmySMN24pstEuxFCS3gd?tab=summary&timestamp=1484.0)
  - [Gradual implementation of new workflow during 8-week strategy sprint](https://fathom.video/share/BZMMXCsUwAkgmmySMN24pstEuxFCS3gd?tab=summary&timestamp=1542.0)

## Next Steps
